artifact: Counts distinct players in the rating band with low defensive work rate.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) AS player_count FROM Player_Attributes WHERE overall_rating >= 60 AND overall_rating < 65 AND defensive_work_rate = 'low';

raw_response.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) AS player_count FROM Player_Attributes WHERE overall_rating >= 60 AND overall_rating < 65 AND defensive_work_rate = 'low';
raw_response.artifact: Counts distinct players in the rating band with low defensive work rate.
